retry_reason: refcount_inc is unconditional and never fails, so no retry is needed or possible.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper for btrfs_fs_context that increments the reference count when duplicating a filesystem context. It transfers ownership of the source string from the source context to the new context, setting the source's source to NULL to prevent double-free. The caller (the new fs_context) acquires a reference to ctx and must later release it via a corresponding put function (e.g., when the fs_context is freed). The operation is unconditional and always succeeds.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to increment the refcount on the shared btrfs_fs_context (ctx) and transfer ownership of the source string to the new fs_context. The only additional logic is moving the ->source pointer to avoid double-free, which is directly part of the dup semantics.
